scripts.test: uv run --locked --all-extras python -m pytest -q && bun run --cwd mcp test
scripts.lint: uv run --locked python scripts/sync_release_metadata.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_contract_schemas.py --check && uv run --locked python -m ruff check . && uv run --locked python -m ruff format --check .
scripts.lint:fix: uv run --locked python -m ruff check . --fix && uv run --locked python -m ruff format .
scripts.typecheck: uv run --locked python -m mypy src && bun run --cwd mcp typecheck && bun run --cwd web typecheck
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.validate:full: bun run validate && bun run build && bun run --cwd web build
